title: Hadoop MapReduce Database Splitter Directory
description: The 'lib/db' directory houses Java classes for dividing database queries into InputSplits. Files like 'BigDecimalSplitter.java' and 'IntegerSplitter.java' extend 'DBSplitter' interface, converting query results into InputSplits. They work with Hadoop's InputSplit and Oracle-specific classes, illustrating the Data-Driven pattern. This enables parallel processing of extensive databases, optimizing Hadoop's MapReduce efficiency.
